episodes.title: Into the Deep
episodes.description: The rescue dive team responds to a collapsed underwater cave system with six people trapped.

episodes.title: Black Water
episodes.description: A night dive recovery in zero-visibility conditions puts the entire team at risk.

episodes.title: Over the Edge
episodes.description: A technical rescue from a sea cliff tests rope and dive coordination simultaneously.

episodes.title: The Narrows
episodes.description: A submerged tunnel system requires custom equipment and a diver small enough to pass through.

episodes.title: Thermal Vent
episodes.description: An unexpected hydrothermal vent near a dive site makes safe extraction nearly impossible.

episodes.title: Surface Tension
episodes.description: A victim with decompression sickness complicates an already complex extraction.

episodes.title: Last Light
episodes.description: With air running critically low, the team makes a split-second decision that saves two lives.

episodes.title: The Cost
episodes.description: After a brutal season, the team reflects on the psychological toll of elite rescue work.

episodes.title: New Depths
episodes.description: The team is called to assist with the first-ever rescue in a newly discovered cave network.

episodes.title: Hostile Waters
episodes.description: An international crisis requires the team to operate in politically unstable waters.

episodes.title: Sidemount
episodes.description: New equipment allows access to a passage that's been sealed for 12 years.

episodes.title: The List
episodes.description: A missing diver's log reveals plans for a solo dive that no one approved — or knew about.

episodes.title: Breach
episodes.description: The team executes the most complex extraction in their history, five days into a multi-stage op.

episodes.title: Debrief
episodes.description: A long debrief session surfaces conflicts within the team about methods and risk tolerance.

extras.title: Dive Equipment Explained
extras.description: The specialized gear that makes rescue diving possible in extreme conditions.

extras.title: Training Day
extras.description: An inside look at how the team prepares for worst-case scenarios.
